betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Renewable Generators§f

§aHarness the power of nature to generate clean, passive fuel-free energy!§f
Industrial Renewal provides several clean, renewable energy sources to power your beginning and mid-game industrial operations.

§6Solar Generation§f:
§b• Solar Panel§f: A passive generator that generates up to §e15 FE/tick§f under direct sunlight.
§b• Solar Frame§f: A mounting structure that increases efficiency. Placing a Solar Panel inside a Solar Frame §amultiplies its energy generation by 2×§f, yielding up to §e30 FE/tick§f per panel.

§6Wind & Hydro Generation§f:
§b• Small Wind Turbine§f: Harvests wind currents at high altitudes. Generates up to §e128 FE/tick§f. Place them high up with clear space around the turbine blades for maximum efficiency.
§b• Dam Generator§f: A hydro-electric generator. Place it in flowing water channels. When water flows through the turbines at full speed, it produces a constant §e1,024 FE/tick§f.

§6Portable Power§f:
§b• Portable Generator§f: A compact emergency power source. Has an internal buffer of §e16,000 FE§f and generates §e32 FE/tick§f by burning solid fuels (like coal). Perfect for powering field equipment or remote mining drills.
